title: Imagent – agentic image/video/speech generation
abstract: Imagent gives AI agents the ability to generate images, video, and speech as a first-class step in their workflows, behind a single interface that hides the differences between providers and models
abstract_zh: Imagent gives AI agents the ability to generate images, video, and speech as a first-class step in their workflows, behind a single interface that hides the differences between providers and models
